candidate_definition_hints.text: Quick start repository for creating a Terraform provider

This template is no longer being maintained and is now archived. We recommend using the [terraform-provider-scaffolding-framework](https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-provider-scaffolding-framework) template repository built on the [Terraform Plugin Framework](https://develop…
